positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial mandala illustration featuring bioluminescent forest flora and swirling nebulae patterns. The composition is highly detailed and centered, designed for a repeating apparel print. Dominant colors are deep sapphire blues, vibrant electric purples, and glowing gold accents, contrasted against an obsidian black background. Focus on clean, sharp outlines, elegant symmetry, and strong decorative impact. The style should blend Art Deco aesthetics with cosmic fantasy illustration, rendered as a clean line-art silhouette with subtle gradients for depth, suitable for screen printing. Highly intricate, highly detailed, macro focus.
negative: low detail, blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, out of focus, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, photorealistic, grayscale, messy, cluttered
